title: Release: v1.19.1
body:
## Changed

- Migrate circular dependency checker from madge to dpdm to resolve indirect dependency security vulnerabilities
- Remove `.madgerc` config file and unused `check:deps:graph` script

title: Release: v1.19.0
body:
## What changed

- Minimum Node.js version raised from >=20 to >=22
- Node 20 reaches EOL on 2026-04-30; Node 22 is the current Active LTS
